ddls:
CREATE TABLE "training_iterations" (
  "iteration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each training iteration */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the model being trained */,
  "iteration" INTEGER /* Iteration number of the training process */,
  "rmse" REAL /* Root Mean Square Error (RMSE) of the model */,
  "datetime_start" TEXT /* Timestamp when the training iteration started */,
  "datetime_complete" TEXT /* Timestamp when the training iteration completed */,
  "duration" TEXT /* Duration of the training iteration */,
  "bagging_freq" INTEGER /* Frequency of bagging during training */,
  "colsample_bytree" REAL /* Column sampling rate for each tree */,
  "lambda_l1" REAL /* L1 regularization term */,
  "lambda_l2" REAL /* L2 regularization term */,
  "learning_rate" REAL /* Learning rate for the model */,
  "max_depth" INTEGER /* Maximum depth of the trees */,
  "min_child_samples" INTEGER /* Minimum number of samples per child node */,
  "n_estimators" INTEGER /* Number of estimators (trees) in the model */,
  "num_leaves" INTEGER /* Number of leaves in each tree */,
  "subsample" REAL /* Subsampling rate for each tree */,
  "state" TEXT /* State of the training iteration (e.g., COMPLETE, RUNNING, FAILED) */,
  "iteration_version" INTEGER /* Version of the iteration */,
  "environment" TEXT /* Environment where the training iteration is run */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset used for training */,
  "compute_resources" TEXT /* Information about the compute resources used */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the iteration */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("iteration_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_training_iterations_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the model */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the model */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the model */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the model was created */,
  "last_updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the model was last updated */,
  "model_version" TEXT /* Version of the model */,
  "model_type" TEXT /* Type of the model (e.g., regression, classification, clustering) */,
  "framework" TEXT /* Machine learning framework used */,
  "is_deployed" INTEGER /* Indicates if the model is currently deployed */,
  "deployment_environment" TEXT /* Environment where the model is deployed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_models_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., data scientist, admin, manager) */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user's team */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user's account is active */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "last_updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role FOREIGN KEY ("role") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the project */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the project */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the project */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the project was created */,
  "last_updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the project was last updated */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project's team */,
  "project_version" TEXT /* Version of the project */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the project (e.g., active, archived) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_projects_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_models" (
  "project_model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project-model link */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model */,
  "model_version" TEXT /* Version of the model linked to the project */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_models_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_models_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "hyperparameters" (
  "hyperparameter_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each hyperparameter */,
  "iteration_id" INTEGER /* ID of the training iteration */,
  "parameter_name" TEXT /* Name of the hyperparameter */,
  "parameter_value" TEXT /* Value of the hyperparameter */,
  "parameter_type" TEXT /* Type of the hyperparameter (e.g., integer, float, string) */,
  "is_default" INTEGER /* Indicates if the hyperparameter is the default value */,
  "adjusted_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who adjusted the hyperparameter */,
  "adjusted_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the hyperparameter was adjusted */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("hyperparameter_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_hyperparameters_iteration_id FOREIGN KEY ("iteration_id") REFERENCES training_iterations ("iteration_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance metric */,
  "iteration_id" INTEGER /* ID of the training iteration */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the performance metric */,
  "metric_value" REAL /* Value of the performance metric */,
  "metric_version" TEXT /* Version of the performance metric */,
  "is_primary" INTEGER /* Indicates if the metric is the primary metric for evaluation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_iteration_id FOREIGN KEY ("iteration_id") REFERENCES training_iterations ("iteration_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "iteration_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "iteration_id" INTEGER /* ID of the training iteration */,
  "log_message" TEXT /* Message or note about the iteration */,
  "log_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the log was created */,
  "logged_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the log */,
  "log_type" TEXT /* Type of the log (e.g., info, warning, error) */,
  "log_level" TEXT /* Severity level of the log (e.g., debug, info, warning, error) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_iteration_logs_logged_by FOREIGN KEY ("logged_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_iteration_logs_iteration_id FOREIGN KEY ("iteration_id") REFERENCES training_iterations ("iteration_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* List of permissions associated with the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)
